rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"Sub-agents (Explore) fail with haiku-model API errors in pipeline stages; use read/glob/grep directly instead.","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Chore/low-risk verification tasks should use direct tool calls (read/glob/grep) rather than sub-agents.","scope":"pipeline"},{"kind":"convention","text":"Chore verification tasks scope is limited to task.md and status.json — no code changes needed.","scope":"pipeline"}]}
